datasets.name: ds-kpi-classic
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, job_id, total_cost_usd, estimated_savings_usd FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.right_sizing_analysis_mv') WHERE compute_type = 'Job Compute'

datasets.name: ds-kpi-serverless
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, job_id, total_cost_usd FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_analysis_mv') WHERE is_serverless = true

datasets.name: ds-compute-compare
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, CASE WHEN is_serverless = true THEN 'Serverless' ELSE 'Classic' END AS compute_type, job_id, total_cost_usd FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_analysis_mv')

datasets.name: ds-classic-sizing
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, job_id, sizing_recommendation, total_cost_usd FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.right_sizing_analysis_mv') WHERE compute_type = 'Job Compute'

datasets.name: ds-instance-type
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, job_id, worker_node_type, total_cost_usd FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.right_sizing_analysis_mv') WHERE compute_type = 'Job Compute' AND worker_node_type IS NOT NULL

datasets.name: ds-job-detail
queryLines: SELECT DATE(r.run_start_time) AS run_start_time, COALESCE(r.job_name, CONCAT('Job ', r.job_id)) AS job_name, r.job_id, r.sizing_recommendation, r.owned_by, r.worker_node_type, COALESCE(CAST(r.configured_workers AS STRING), CONCAT(CAST(r.min_autoscale_workers AS STRING), '-', CAST(r.max_autoscale_workers AS STRING))) AS workers_config, r.run_count, ROUND(r.avg_cpu_util, 1) AS avg_cpu_pct, ROUND(r.avg_mem_util, 1) AS avg_mem_pct, ROUND(r.total_cost_usd, 2) AS total_cost_usd, ROUND(r.estimated_savings_usd, 2) AS estimated_savings_usd, r.recommendation_detail, CONCAT('/jobs/', r.job_id) AS job_url FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.right_sizing_analysis_mv') r WHERE r.compute_type = 'Job Compute' ORDER BY r.total_cost_usd DESC

datasets.name: ds-srv-top
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, COALESCE(job_name, CONCAT('Job ', job_id)) AS job_label, ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd), 2) AS total_cost, COUNT(DISTINCT job_run_id) AS run_count FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_analysis_mv') WHERE is_serverless = true GROUP BY DATE(run_start_time), job_name, job_id ORDER BY total_cost DESC

datasets.name: ds-srv-detail
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, COALESCE(job_name, CONCAT('Job ', job_id)) AS job_label, COUNT(DISTINCT job_run_id) AS run_count, ROUND(AVG(run_duration_minutes), 1) AS avg_duration_min, ROUND(SUM(total_dbus), 2) AS total_dbus, ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd), 2) AS total_cost FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_analysis_mv') WHERE is_serverless = true GROUP BY DATE(run_start_time), job_name, job_id ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 200

datasets.name: ds-ap-kpi
queryLines: SELECT run_start_time, cluster_id, job_count, total_cost_usd FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.all_purpose_cluster_sizing_mv')

datasets.name: ds-ap-cluster
queryLines: SELECT cluster_id, cluster_name, owned_by, worker_node_type, COALESCE(CAST(configured_workers AS STRING), CONCAT(COALESCE(CAST(min_autoscale_workers AS STRING),'?'), '-', COALESCE(CAST(max_autoscale_workers AS STRING),'?'))) AS workers_config, job_count, run_count, ROUND(avg_cpu_util, 1) AS avg_cpu_util, ROUND(avg_mem_util, 1) AS avg_mem_util, total_cost_usd, run_start_time, sizing_recommendation AS sizing_signal, recommendation_detail AS job_isolation_recommendation FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.all_purpose_cluster_sizing_mv') ORDER BY total_cost_usd DESC

datasets.name: ds-ap-signal-dist
queryLines: SELECT sizing_recommendation AS sizing_signal, COUNT(*) AS cluster_count, MIN(run_start_time) AS run_start_time FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.all_purpose_cluster_sizing_mv') GROUP BY sizing_recommendation

datasets.name: ds-ap-jobs
queryLines: SELECT cluster_name, COALESCE(job_name, CONCAT('Job ', job_id)) AS job_name, COUNT(DISTINCT job_run_id) AS run_count, ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd), 2) AS total_cost_usd, DATE(MIN(run_start_time)) AS run_start_time FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.job_run_cost_analysis_mv') WHERE cluster_source = 'UI' GROUP BY cluster_name, job_name, job_id ORDER BY total_cost_usd DESC LIMIT 50

datasets.name: ds-util-dist
queryLines: SELECT DATE(run_start_time) AS run_start_time, job_id, CASE WHEN avg_cpu_util IS NULL THEN 'No Data' WHEN avg_cpu_util < 20 THEN '<20%' WHEN avg_cpu_util < 40 THEN '20-40%' WHEN avg_cpu_util < 60 THEN '40-60%' WHEN avg_cpu_util < 80 THEN '60-80%' ELSE '>80%' END AS cpu_range, CASE WHEN avg_mem_util IS NULL THEN 'No Data' WHEN avg_mem_util < 20 THEN '<20%' WHEN avg_mem_util < 40 THEN '20-40%' WHEN avg_mem_util < 60 THEN '40-60%' WHEN avg_mem_util < 80 THEN '60-80%' ELSE '>80%' END AS mem_range FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.right_sizing_analysis_mv') WHERE compute_type = 'Job Compute'

datasets.name: ds-spill
queryLines:
SELECT
  spill_date AS run_start_time,
  compute_label, is_job_attributed, job_id, job_name, warehouse_id, cluster_id,
  statement_type, executed_by,
  spill_gb, read_gb, shuffle_gb, read_files, pruned_files, exec_s,
  root_cause, root_cause_detail, statement_text, statement_id
FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.query_spill_v')
ORDER BY spill_gb DESC

datasets.name: ds-spill-jobs
queryLines:
SELECT
  spill_date AS run_start_time,
  job_id, job_name, compute_label, spill_gb, shuffle_gb, exec_s, root_cause
FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.query_spill_v')
WHERE job_id IS NOT NULL

datasets.name: ds-disk-pressure
queryLines:
SELECT
  p.sample_date AS run_start_time,
  p.cluster_id, n.cluster_name, p.samples, p.avg_mem_pct, p.max_swap_pct,
  p.min_disk_free_gb, p.mins_disk_low, p.pressure_signal
FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.cluster_disk_pressure_v') p
LEFT JOIN IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.cluster_names') n ON p.cluster_id = n.cluster_id
ORDER BY p.min_disk_free_gb ASC

datasets.name: ds-expanded-disk
queryLines:
SELECT
  e.event_date AS run_start_time,
  e.event_time, e.cluster_id, n.cluster_name, e.event_type, e.instance_id,
  e.previous_disk_size, e.disk_size, e.free_space_bytes, e.cause
FROM IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.expanded_disk_events') e
LEFT JOIN IDENTIFIER(:p_catalog || '.' || :p_schema || '.cluster_names') n ON e.cluster_id = n.cluster_id
ORDER BY e.event_time DESC

lines: Sizing signals: DEFINITE_DOWNSIZE · LIKELY_DOWNSIZE · BURST_PATTERN · IO_BOTTLENECK · CONSIDER_UPSIZE · APPROPRIATE

frame.title: Jobs Running on Shared All-Purpose Clusters

lines: ## 💽 Disk Spill Audit — Job Compute · Serverless · SQL Warehouse
로컬 디스크로 spill 한 코드/쿼리의 현황. `system.query.history` 기반 (Method A). Compute Type 으로 **SQL Warehouse / Serverless / Classic** 을, Root Cause 로 튜닝 방향을 구분한다. _기간/카탈로그/스키마는 Global Filters 페이지에서 조정._
## 🔎 Spill Detail · Disk Pressure · Expanded-Disk Events
문장 단위 spill 진단(원인+처방), 클러스터 disk-free floor(elastic-disk 확장 신호), 그리고 Cluster Events API 에서 적재한 **실제 EXPANDED_DISK 이벤트**.
### Cluster disk-free / swap pressure (elastic-disk expansion signal)
_Cluster Events API 기반. Serverless 는 이벤트가 없고, 종료된 job 클러스터는 ~30일 후 purge 되므로 초기에는 비어 있을 수 있다 — 매일 적재되며 시간이 지날수록 채워진다._

_**Cause** 는 Cluster Events API가 돌려주는 각 이벤트의 `details.cause` 값 그대로다(가공 없음). 주로 `DID_NOT_EXPAND_DISK` 에서 디스크 자동 확장이 안 된 사유가 채워지고, 정상 확장(`EXPANDED_DISK`)은 비어 있을 수 있다. 원본 details 전체는 `expanded_disk_events.details_json` 컬럼에 보관된다._
